reviews.title: Unclean room
reviews.text: I messaged them ahead of time that i have a separate booking but same room type and i mentioned that i want the same room because i dont want to room move. But during my first night they told me that they will upgrade my room for only 1 night in one of their premium rooms. When I entered the room theres ants on the table, pillow have stains, dusts on the floor and the wall oh my gosh very dirty. It has a stain of i think water came from the ceiling and the color is orange. The next day i asked them to do a room move which they did before 12nn. But still a bit traumatic experience for me since a friend of mine highly reco this hotel.

reviews.title: Cheap, cheap hotel at great location.
reviews.text:
A guy at the lobby asked me to pay additional 3% if I pay with credit card, and additional payment was not noticed when I book through Agoda. 
After I get in the room, there was no window, which wasn.t informed, too. I was almost naked to take shower, but a sudden cleaning lady opened the door, and I shouted out full of scare. 
There was no shampoo and conditioner I could use(only two shower gels were on the shelf), and used sanitary stuff was located on the hair-dryer. 
Furthermore, there were soooo many long hairs on the chair in front of mirror, so I never sat there. 
This hotel is furnished with beautiful furnitures and new facilities, and is located at very heart of old quarter Hanoi, but the rude attitude and dirty condition of the room made me regret to stay here. 
I guess they're not ready to accommodate guests after covid-19 situation.

reviews.title: Will not recommend
reviews.text: Although the hotel is available at a budget, the services are getting compromised. I did not have a good experience at this hotel during check in itself. I was told on mail that in case room is available, you would be allowed to check in early as my flight from India was reaching in morning. While I reached hotel, the reception staff declined the availability of any room of any category for checkin. When I said that , no problem , I will go and checkin in some nearby hotel for a day and will come back later. They understood that I am ready to pay the price for one night. Immediately they told me that there system is showing that they have one room available and they can facilitate my checkin however the cost is half of the room stay for a night for my 4 hours early checkin. I agreed. But I now understood the scam behind this. I have been a frequent traveller, this was the first such experience. The breakfast is just a tick mark in the services they offer. Room is just good enough for sleeping . Location is one plus point. They are heavily understaffed so much so that they denied sending anyone to get my luggage from the room too during checkout. Won't recommend, won't come back. There are many other options .

Particularly Anna and Sarah were really helpful and went out of out their way to help us. They really were exceptional and even did it with a smile.

reviews.title: If you think of it as just a place to sleep, it's highly recommended due to its good location.
reviews.text: I used this for a group trip. Some rooms had broken door chains (but the door locks were functional), and there were issues with TV reception. However, the breakfast had a wide variety, linens were changed daily, and the cleaning of the bathroom and toilet was fine, but there was dust accumulating under the bed. The staff were polite and friendly. It's a short distance to Hoan Kiem, but it's quiet, and there are many dining options nearby, so it's sufficient for sightseeing during the day and just sleeping at night.

reviews.text: We have stayed in many hotels this trip and this one provided the least customer service. We have grown accustomed to a bellman opening the door to greet us and inquire about our day and stay, but the Minasi HanoiOi is much more understated. Though friendly, there is very little interaction between staff and guests. It was clean enough and nice room size.

reviews.title: A well located small boutique hotel
reviews.text:
Pro :  Well located. On south side, one block from Hoan Kiem, not exactly in the central area, but convenient enough. I stayed in Rm 501, which is probably the largest room. Very spacious. Decor nice. Breakfast is okay, very basic foods.  

Con :  Like other Hanoi hotels, the bathroom design has a basic flaw. When taking a shower in the bathtube, water spills all over the floor and the curtain does not help.  Also, there is some govt office across the street. Every morning around 6:30am, there's a broadcast of some communist propaganda stuff. Very loud. But it lasts only 20 min or so. Keep in mind this is a small hotel, almost like a family business. So don't expect too much.

I especially enjoyed the comfortable bed and the friendly staff. If I ever go back to Hanoi, I would definitely stay at the HanoiOi Hotel again.

reviews.title: Lake view room
reviews.text:
Beautiful large room, Cant really see the lake but the room size is amazing.
Beds are super comfy…. We had 2 stays here in different rooms.
Only thing I did find strange was the showers, No use having a curtain really as water went everywhere out the shower.
Close to food, About a 10min walk to old quarter, 5 min walk to lake.
Some really friendly staff here.
House  keeping is done up till about 6pm but does get done and ladies are wonderful.
Kept our luggage in storage while we went to Halong Bay for a couple of nights which we really appreciated.
I would recommend staying here.

reviews.title: Location
reviews.text: Prices can be high location is good if you looking to stay by turtle lake
reviews.response:
Dear Henry,

Thank you for choosing Minasi for your 4-night stay in Hanoi and for sharing your feedback!

We are glad to hear that you enjoyed our location near Turtle Lake (Hoan Kiem Lake). It is indeed one of the most vibrant and beautiful areas of the city, and we are happy it suited your needs as a solo traveler.

Regarding the pricing, we appreciate your honest feedback. We strive to offer competitive rates that reflect the prime location and the quality of our studio rooms. However, we understand that value is key, and we will continue to work on enhancing our services to ensure every guest feels they are getting the best possible experience for their investment.

We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for another stay by the lake in the future!

Best regards,

The Management Team
Minasi Hotel

Minasi HanoiOi Hotel

reviews.title: Dans l’ensemble très bien
reviews.positives: Le changement total d’attitude de tout le personnel lors de notre deuxième journée sur place ainsi que le généreux geste commercial qu’ils ont fait pour corriger la mauvaise gestion de notre arrivée le 21 août au soir.
reviews.negatives:
Nous avons été mal reçu car nos chambres communicantes avaient été cédé à d’autres clients alors qu’après nous avoir fait payer les nôtres je me suis aperçu que ce n’était pas du tout celles que j’avais réservées ( elles étaient de qualité inférieure et à des étages différents, une au troisième étage et l’autre au cinquième ). Les explications données pour cela étaient plus que douteuses, bref cela a été un checking très choquant. 
Par contre le manager et le personnel de l’hôtel c’est vraiment bien rattrapé et à tout fait pour s’excuser de la manière dont on avait été traité la veille avec, notamment, un geste commercial très généreux.
C’est cette deuxième journée et nuit passée à l’hôtel qui m’incite à donner de si bonnes notes car vraiment ce deuxième jour a été exceptionnel. 
Je recommande cet hôtel

reviews.title: Comfort and Convenience at Near‑Best Value
reviews.text:
Me, my wife and a friend stayed at this hotel during our trip to Hanoi for 6days & 6 nights. The staff was superb, friendly, attentive and very accomodating especially Sir Victor who was very helpful in all our requests and Ms Sarah who was very kind to assist us in all our travel and tour bookings.

The hotel offers the best value for money in the area, which is just a 100 meters from Hoan Kiem Lake and walking distance to the old quarter and other places such as convenience stores, Madame Huong bakery with their yummy goods, banks and cultural attractions. It also has comfortable beds for a good night’s rest.

We didn’t mind that there was not a gym or pool because we went to Hanoi to explore the city especially the old quarter and went touring near outside Hanoi. Not much time for a swim or even a workout for the duration of our stay, we were out of the hotel each morning and came back late night even so it seemed we didn’t had enough time to explore.

It also comes with a buffet breakfast, although limited but what do you expect for the price range of the hotel.

Only downside is shower water pressure a bit weak and aircon/air vents needs to be cleaned (air coming out of airvents have dust with it, but only in our room in our friend’s room he doesn’t have this problem).

All in all this hotel is more than enough if you are in a budget. It offers way more than what you paid for..

Hopefully the establishment can improve their water pressure in their showers and also clean/maintain the aircon vents properly.

We will definitely book here again on our next visit to Hanoi.

Some complaints about the noise, while I did not hear anything from the street while staying in a room on the third floor, I could hear the noise from the restaurant downstairs starting from 6 am with chairs moving back and forth.  During my second stay, I was on a higher floor and this was not an issue. However, the room had a shared door with another room (closed, probably used for family stays), and the soundproofing was poor as I good hear the conversation the other person had on the phone. Was not a problem during the night, but I guess it would depend on your neighbor. 

Overall, very good value for money, with noise being a minor problem.

If I have the chance to visit Hanoi again, my family and I would choose to stay at the hotel.
